_meta.methodology: All entries are sourced from published, peer-reviewed research reports. Every domain or indicator includes a source citation. This database makes NO assertions beyond what the cited research established. Confidence scores are generated from infrastructure signal overlap — not from this database alone.

sources.CL-174: Citizen Lab Report No. 174 — Alberto Fittarelli, 'PAPERWALL: Chinese Websites Posing as Local News Outlets Target Global Audiences with Pro-Beijing Content', University of Toronto, February 7, 2024. https://citizenlab.ca/2024/02/paperwall-chinese-websites-posing-as-local-news-outlets-with-pro-beijing-content/
sources.GRAPHIKA-FA: Graphika — Margot Fulde-Hardy, 'Falsos Amigos: Network of Domains and Social Media Accounts Uses AI Tools to Launder Reports From Chinese State Media Outlet CGTN in Multiple Languages', August 27, 2025. https://graphika.com/reports/falsos-amigos
sources.DFRLAB-PV: DFRLab / CheckFirst — 'Russia's so-called Pravda Network Expands Worldwide', Atlantic Council, February 24, 2025. https://dfrlab.org/2025/02/24/russia-pravda-network-expands-worldwide/
sources.VIGINUM-PK: VIGINUM — 'Portal Kombat: An Offensive Cyber Influence Operation Coordinated Against France and Its Partners', Secretariat-General for National Defence and Security, February 2024.
sources.META-Q1-2023: Meta — 'Adversarial Threat Report Q1 2023', Meta Platforms, 2023.
sources.MANDIANT-HE: Mandiant — 'HaiEnergy: Chinese Influence Operations Use PR Firm Tactics to Target Multiple Countries', 2022.

cn._notes: Chinese state-aligned influence infrastructure. Tier 1 = confirmed state media. Tier 2 = confirmed affiliate/launderer. ASNs = hosting providers with documented use by CN influence operations.

tier2_confirmed_affiliates.name: Times Newswire
tier2_confirmed_affiliates.notes: Central content hub for PAPERWALL network. Backlinked by 98 of 123 PAPERWALL domains. Seeded pro-Beijing political content within commercial press releases. Previously linked to HaiEnergy operation by Mandiant.

tier2_confirmed_affiliates.name: World Development Press
tier2_confirmed_affiliates.notes: Hosted on Tencent IP address linked to 16 other PAPERWALL domains. Key attribution pivot in CL-174.

tier2_confirmed_affiliates.name: Update News
tier2_confirmed_affiliates.notes: First registered PAPERWALL domain (July 2019). Targeted US audiences.

paperwall_sample_domains._notes: Representative sample of confirmed PAPERWALL domains from CL-174. Full list of 123 domains in the published report. These are used as reference anchors for infrastructure comparison — NOT as an exhaustive blocklist.

hosting_asns.name: Alibaba Cloud (Aliyun)
hosting_asns.notes: All 11 Falsos Amigos domains registered via Alibaba Cloud. Primary hosting provider for confirmed CN influence ops.

hosting_asns.name: Tencent Cloud
hosting_asns.notes: PAPERWALL Italian-language domains hosted on Tencent Cloud IP. Also linked to wdpp.org attribution pivot.

hosting_asns.name: Baidu Cloud
hosting_asns.notes: Chinese state-linked cloud. Flagged in multiple IO infrastructure reports.

hosting_asns.name: China Telecom Next Generation Carrier Network
hosting_asns.notes: State-owned carrier. Presence alongside commercial hosting is notable.

hosting_asns.name: China Telecom (ChinaNet)
hosting_asns.notes: State-owned. Standard flag for CN-origin infrastructure.

hosting_asns.name: China Unicom
hosting_asns.notes: State-owned. Low weight alone — significant when combined with other signals.

registrar_flags.notes: Falsos Amigos: all 11 domains registered via Alibaba Cloud registrar.
Commonly used by CN ops to appear Western. Low weight alone.
Used in some PAPERWALL registrations. Low weight alone.

known_analytics_ids.notes: Haimai (Shenzhen Haimaiyunxiang Media Co. Ltd.) advertising ID found linking PAPERWALL sites to their operator. THIS IS THE PRIMARY ATTRIBUTION SIGNAL IN CL-174.

content_signals.description: Page HTML contains outbound link to cgtn.com
content_signals.notes: PAPERWALL: 95 domains backlinked to CGTN. Falsos Amigos: all content laundered from CGTN.

content_signals.description: Page HTML contains outbound link to timesnewswire.com
content_signals.notes: 98 of 123 PAPERWALL domains backlinked to Times Newswire.

content_signals.description: Page HTML contains outbound link to globaltimes.cn
content_signals.notes: 86 PAPERWALL domains backlinked to Global Times.

content_signals.description: Page HTML contains WPBakery page builder signature classes
content_signals.notes: PAPERWALL used WPBakery consistently across the network as a template identifier.

content_signals.description: Logo or header image shows AI generation artifacts (detected via metadata/ELA)
content_signals.notes: Falsos Amigos used AI-generated logos across all 11 domains.

content_signals.description: Domain registered within 30-day window of 2+ other flagged domains
content_signals.notes: PAPERWALL registered domains in waves — 9 in a single month targeting Japan.

content_signals.description: Site has no named journalists, no About page, no contact form, no company registration
content_signals.notes: Universal across PAPERWALL and Falsos Amigos networks.

content_signals.description: Page contains article attacking Li-Meng Yan
content_signals.notes: Found verbatim on every active PAPERWALL website as of December 2023.

ru._notes: Russian state-aligned influence infrastructure. Sourced from DFRLab/CheckFirst Pravda investigation and VIGINUM Portal Kombat report.

tier2_confirmed_affiliates.name: Pravda Network hub domain
tier2_confirmed_affiliates.notes: Central domain for Pravda network. 140+ subdomains targeting 83+ countries. Attributed to TigerWeb (Crimea-based IT company, owner Yevgeny Shevchenko).
tier2_confirmed_affiliates.confidence_basis: DNS, WHOIS, IP history, content analysis

pravda_subdomain_pattern._notes: Pravda network uses predictable subdomain patterns. Tool should flag domains matching these patterns even without database match.

hosting_asns.name: Reg.ru / TigerWeb-linked hosting
hosting_asns.notes: TigerWeb infrastructure traced to this ASN range. Primary Pravda network hosting.

hosting_asns.name: MAROSNET Telecommunication Company
hosting_asns.notes: Russian hosting flagged in Pravda network infrastructure.

content_signals.description: Page HTML contains outbound link to rt.com
Page HTML contains outbound link to tass.ru
Domain name matches known Pravda naming convention

scoring._notes: Confidence score formula. Max 100. Scores are additive up to the cap. Tool displays individual signal breakdown — never just the final number.
